features.name: Mechanical Handle Locking
features.rationale: Must_be — physical handle block is the commodity FP core. Safety (9) and Reliability (8): directly addresses N04 (false-negative alarm rate). Delight (1) — no surprise value.

features.name: Audible Alarm Trigger
features.rationale: Must_be — commodity FP explicitly names audible alarm. Safety (10): primary deterrence and immediate notification. Stress (7): FM receives local notification even without IoT dashboard.

features.name: Single-Motion Emergency Release
features.rationale: Must_be — EN 179/EN 1125 certification requirement; absence is a regulatory knockout. Safety (10): fire evacuation compliance. Confidence (9): certification provides legal certainty.

features.name: Key Override Bypass
features.rationale: One_dimensional — richer key management proportionally improves FM operations. Stress (7): directly addresses N08 (false alarms from authorized access). Pain (6): eliminates alarm-trigger/silence cycle.

features.name: Battery-Powered Operation
features.rationale: Must_be — commercial lessors operate existing building stock where adding conduit per door is prohibitively expensive. Cost (8) and Pain (8): directly serves N01 (no permanent electrical modification). Confidence (5) depressed by C4 battery life uncertainty.

features.name: Pre-Alarm Warning
features.rationale: Attractive — dominant A1 competitor (40% share) does not have this. Delight (6): warns-before-it-alarms is genuinely unexpected. Stress (7): reduces FM false-alarm anxiety in multi-tenant buildings.

productRelatedNeeds: Minimize the likelihood of EasyWave protocol dependency requiring full hardware replacement when a portfolio transitions to open-standard BMS
Minimize the likelihood of 868 MHz signal attenuation through reinforced concrete floor slabs creating per-floor monitoring blackouts in multi-story buildings
Minimize the likelihood of IoT door-event timestamp collection triggering a GDPR Article 35 DPIA in EU commercial office deployments
Minimize the likelihood of unheated stairwell and service corridor temperature variations reducing battery service life below the 2-year target
